name: Server Balance Patches
description: Server balance tweaks via JSON asset patches: 2x tree-seed drops from leaves, ~1.2x ore-block drops, 2x firewood/charcoal burn time, 1.5x meat yields, 2x armor durability, and metal knife/spear-head forging output of 2. Also adds a crafting recipe: 1 firewood -> 2 sticks. Server-authoritative; Universal so clients auto-download and keep handbook/tooltip numbers correct.
